path.description: Project-relative or absolute path to the source file.

media_type.description: IANA media type, e.g. text/markdown, application/json.

output_dir.description: Directory the skill writes artefacts + manifest to. Created if missing; subject to scope sandbox.

manifest_path.description: Override path to manifest.json. Defaults to <output_dir>/manifest.json.

batch_size.description: Soft-cap 5, hard-cap 10. Higher values rejected at parse-time.

trace_id.description: UUID for genie.action_log correlation. Auto-generated if absent.

chain_to.description: Downstream skill IDs to invoke on PASS. Empty list disables chaining.
